payload.repeat_signal_posture: strong within one session but only emerging across separate reviewed cycles
payload.determinism_posture: medium because owner judgment and mixed local plus GitHub delivery modes still matter
payload.reversibility_posture: moderate because git history, PR trace, and append-only seed sync exist, but the route still mutates many public surfaces
payload.not_now_reason: One full closure cycle is enough for classification but not yet enough for honest automation promotion across approval-sensitive multi-repo delivery.
payload.proof_surface_notes: Repo-native validators, GitHub PR test plus smoke, and Dionysus owner-repo reality checks make the route inspectable without granting schedule authority.
